description: It was so easy for me to whip up a survey for a client of mine. It looked so professional! Such is my experience when creating quizzes of any type with involve.me
author: Shade O.
pros: This tool is sooo versatile! Love the fact that they cater to different scenarios as far as creating quizzes are concerned. Such a rich template library ensures quick and easy creation! The feature-set is also unique and the tool is constantly improving!
cons: Nothing really! The tool is great all round, so no complaints. The team really listens to it's user-base and implements features that make sense for them.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: The surveys keep my users engaged in my website
description: My website is a message board and community, so the main issue we face is creating and promoting discussions, especially in the age of other social media. Involve.me has helped tremendously with this, as the surveys and quizzes I make for the site create engagement and promote conversations, users share their results and engage with one another. By all metrics, users spend more time on the site when I invite my users to complete a new survey or quiz.
author: Juan D.
pros: I run a discussion board community, so engagement and discussion is incredibly important to me. Creating surveys through Involve.me has dramatically increased the engagement of my users, who have been spending time sharing and discussing their results with other users. I've also experimented creating quizzes, and the response has been overwhelmingly positive as users and visitors enjoy the challenge and boasting about their results afterwards. The most helpful aspect of Involve.me are the tools, which are very intuitive and easy to use. I was actually surprised at how quickly it was to set up and customize the quizzes and surveys to match the look of my site, as well as immediately provide the users with feedback regarding their response. The tools as just plain fun to experiment with, and the templates help get you started. I originally started with their free account tier, but my first survey skyrocketed in responses and had to subscribe to their basic paid plan immediately. I can say that it has been worth it, and I'll continue to use Involve.me in the future.
cons: There is a cost and benefit evaluation when using a service like Involve.me. While I love seeing my users engaged with the quizzes and surveys I've created, my site is a hobby, and adding the costs of Involve.me to my hobby is a crucial decision to make. I think the price is rather steep, starting at $25/mo, and I wish there were a lower tier as my needs seem to fall in between the limitations of the free level and the starter plan. With that said, the 14-day trial gives you a good idea of whether the service is helpful to you. I think it is, and I also think it's a unique product with nothing else like it out there. There is nothing quite as intuitive and engaging for both myself and my users as Involve.me.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Excellent Plug and Play, Just a bit Expensive!
description: If it weren't so expensive and the capabilities weren't so limited on the entry level plans, I would love this and utilize it all the time. I just can't justify the expense for my website that does not make much income at all.
author: Alec H.
pros: I really enjoyed the plug and play aspect of this software. It is relatively simple to set up and get going on your website on day one.
cons: The price and the baiting with limited features was the most frustrating. You basically need to purchase the most expensive plans to have features that seem like they are necessary just for basic operation (not able to prevent quiz loading for visitors upon page refresh or new pages, annoys the heck out of them).
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Simple, fast and easy to use UI
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It is a simple application to get users engaging with your content. The IFTTT for the flow is a little tricky and importing data to automate that wasn't accessible for our account level. But it gave us a decent starting point to build out the tool as we intended.
cons: We were deciding between hiring someone to do the work for us, or doing it ourselves. Involve.me allowed us to DIY more than some other tools. We ended up going with Excentos for a different variation of the tool we were testing which had a hybrid DIY + significant support from Excentos.
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

description: Ability to create high converting, interactive content for lead generation
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: BrandQuiz offers users a smooth, guided interface with easy navigation abilities. It has beautiful and attractive looking templates . The team has focused on ensuring creators can view how the quiz will appear on a mobile (responsive layout) during the quiz creation process so that changes can be incorporated early. The team behind this is strong and constantly working to add new features.
cons: The tool is fairly new and needs a few improvements. My top ask is for them to have Webhooks integrated. That would open up so many more opportunities for interactions with other products such as CRM systems which would make it powerful to use. Also, at present, the calculator feature is quite basic and buggy. If I want to create sophisticated calculations like expected returns using a mathematical model, I cannot use this tool in its current state. The charting abilities of the tool are also quite basic at present. However, I do acknowledge that the tool is in its infancy and with a great team backing it, BrandQuiz will only get better going forward.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: An amazing form builder with beautiful UI
description: Productivity. The power to design a great survey experience for our site visitors.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I use Brandquiz to create forms and surveys as I work in a marketing communications role. It is easy to use drag and has a drag-drop from-builder. The UI is sleek and customizable and I can export responses via csv & excel. The nice thing is that the tool is so easy to use and understand and offers a lot of customization. The ability to preview how the quiz would appear on a desktop and mobile is so handy!
cons: I haven't really found any cons as such. They recently added the ability to have drop-down options as well as a slider. The team is constantly adding new features. One feature I am looking forward to the most is the webhooks feature. That would allow much more power in moving around the survey results directly into other apps.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Within 20 minutes I had a leadcapture/ quiz on my site. Awesome.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: With the ability to do personality quizzes, ROI calculators and quoting, surveys (all either embedded or on their own landing page) this tool has easily become one of my top purchases. It's easy to use, mobile friendly and has tons of gorgeous templates.
cons: A couple of the features are still developing (I'm looking forward to more advanced calculator features) but the roadmap has those things coming.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I've had a good experience with them. It's a solid product built by a solid team. They do everything they can to ensure their platform is not only robust but stable for users.
author: Jonathan E.
pros: Honestly, this is one of the best platforms on the market for creating interactive surveys, quizzes and more. Don't let me tell you otherwise, I'd just try it out yourself!
cons: The biggest con here is that Involve.me may be stepping away from their initial intended purpose. Lately they've created some extra features... which probably just were not needed... like accepting payments in the forms... But maybe that's just my use case!
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Easy to use, easy to build quizzes - sure-shot way to attract and engage site visitors.
description: Engages plenty of site visitors. Used this to share lead magnets and quizzes for partner companies.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I really like the smooth, guided navigation the quizzes have. The templates are top notch giving the quizzes a premium feel. And of course the responsive layout along with ability to preview how quizzes would appear on mobile devices allow one to make tweaks before finalizing designs. The team behind this is very responsive and willing to listen feedback on adding new features. Buying this is a no brainer.
cons: Allowing the CNAME feature to hide the URL of the quiz is only available on the agency plan and not on the pro plan.
author_profession: Channel Marketing Lead - Surveillance, South Asia
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: None
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Not much. I liked the idea of having a tool I could use to create engagement and have a customized workflow for visitors on my site.
cons: The tool is half-baked and broken. The calculator has the most basic formatting errors, including not having comma's automatically placed when a visitor enters in a number (forcing the visitor to have to count how many times they hit zero for example when entering the number 6,500,000. (despite having a loan calculator as one of their pre-built templates) The color picker wheel to select text color change was also broken. I mean, c'mon, basic features of what their core tool set should be about.
author_profession: Commercial Real Estate and Business Brokerage Expert
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Samuele P.
pros: I like the platform design, as well as the dashboard where we created a lot of quizzes and surveys for our customers. It's easy to understand and use.
cons: I would have liked more features and more flexibility in quizzes and surveys creation. But they are a great team and you can talk with them, as well as suggest new features.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Great for providing personalized conversion funnel
description: involve.me is an excellent plaform that helps to increase the efficiency of the conversion funnels.
author: Jennifer V.
pros: Increases the engagement of our customers in every step of the conversion funnel in our web applications. It increase the conversion rates dramatically.
cons: We are not that much comfortable about the pricing plans, their pricing could be more user-friendly both for long term and short term commitments.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Easy to use Form and Quiz Builder
description: User-friendly to use. Fast support response time. Great customisation possibilities. Very pleasant overall and can definitely recommend to everybody.
author: Tom S.
pros: Software is very easy to use and offers a lot of possibilities. I love that you can simply embed what you created in your site and make it white label. Great statistics in the backend. Ongoing development of the software. And I like that like myself the software creators are from Austria, a rarity in the SaaS world I have to say.
cons: If you embed you quiz on your site there is a small white boarder around the embed that you can't get rid of.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

description: We used the free trial and due to traveling at the time, our staff was unable to cancel. We contacted customer support THE NEXT DAY, and they would not refund us our years worth of subscription we DIDNT want, because of being 24 hours late. This was an unfortunate blow- never have I heard of a company refusing to refund someone for the use of a free trial cancelled a day late. So unprofessional.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It was a cool product, but as a small company we had to really evaluate what we could afford at this time and it didn't make the cut.
cons: DO NOT use free trial. If for nay reason you miss the cancelation, say bye to your money.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Enjoyable way to create and collect data
author: Ye J.
pros: Beautiful frontend user experience and to create the form is straightforward, easy and intuitive. A good variety of prebuilt templates to get started. Build quiz with different outcomes as a lead magnet or create an visually beautiful lead form with self-upload imgs as options input. Zapier ready to push data to other web apps for automation.
cons: The only thing missing which i truly feel will br an asset for brandquiz - allow users to login via their social accounts for 1-click convenience. Good for us publishers.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A very best software for QUIZES!
description: I have used this involve.me for my class work. It helped me lot. Results were analyzed and it was like a peanut on my palm after using this software.
author: Ishan R.
pros: This software has each and every option for a advanced quiz program. I recommend it for all who needs.
cons: Nothing! all good. it is better if you can set up a timer for several question, I mean for a question paper we use time limit for the whole paper instead of single questions.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Love the customer support. Florian is so patient and a total rock star
author: Kathy W.
pros: It allows my business to due exactly what I need it to do
cons: No payment integration for customers available
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Really like the software.
author: Ilse P.
pros: The software is easy to use and intuitive. the templates make it easy to build quizzes without having to start from scratch. The logic is already built and easy to customize
cons: No cons at this point. I've created 1 quiz
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Matt B.
pros: I love how easy it was to create a questionnaire and get clients to fill in something that looks so professional.
cons: There was nothing i didnt like about Involve me
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Get more people to engage with your organisation
author: Eleonora S.
pros: This is a fun and easy way to make aesthetically pleasing quizzes something that we instantaneously noticed increased our member engagement! We reached 100 submissions within days and were so happy we upgraded immediately.
cons: For a non-profit organisation, it might be a bit expensive to afford a year-long plan.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Maggie C.
pros: Great templates available, easy to create a calculator from scratch.
cons: The calculate element is not available in the free version.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Elisa T.
pros: We've been using this software to create quizzes. It is easy to use and looks modern.
cons: Sometimes I want a given quiz option to be associated with multiple possible quiz results - however, only 1 option is allowed to be associated with 1 outcome.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great tool with too many features behind an expensive paywall
description: Overall we love the tool and it's capabilities, but are frustrated with the blocking of basic features like Google Tag. I reached out to help them manually ad tracking to my form and they said it wasn't possible without upgrading - kinda frustrating even after spending $300+
author: Cyrus C.
pros: It's easy and fun to create interactive and dynamic quizzes.
cons: They block the Google Tag behind a paywall, they know people want to track conversions so it's basically useless if you don't pay extra. We already pay for the first tier and are missing huge functionality.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I used involve.me to create personality quizzes, which provided a huge opportunity for opt-in conversions at live events.
author: Keri K.
pros: I loved being able to created weighted personality quizzes that served as opt-ins for businesses.
cons: nothing stands out as significantly negative
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

review_title: I have used other quiz platforms, this one is by far the best one!
description: I host a personality-type quiz and a program application on involve.me I have had quite a few issues with figuring out the outcomes, but once I did, it's pretty simple. I wish there was a more intuitive builder with more freedom to move things anywhere within the funnel, regardless of the template or type. I think more freedom with the templates/types and more freedom with moving around within them. For example, being able to jump from an outcome page BACK to a quiz page without having to RESTART the quiz. That would be great!
author: Breann B.
pros: I like that this is not JUST quiz software, but also can create/host landing pages, surveys, evaluations, etc. I like the capabilities. I like how creative you can get with it. I like how simple the element builder is. I like how easy it is to export data, clear the results, and how you can build a quiz pretty quickly!
cons: I do think there are features that are missing and could be improved and I also think the price for the value is a little exacerbated. I don't think that you should have to pay for the middle plan to get the watermark removed. It seems like the least expensive option is just a few minor features above the free one, which is discouraging. I think they could certainly add some features to make this mid-package a little more tempting. Aside from white-labeling, also adding more email capabilities would be incredible. I am thinking of a full funnel. Involve can fulfill the lead capture and the first step of an email campaign, but no further than that, therefore it's a lot of piecing things together to make it flow, and Zapier doesn't integrate well with the platform. So, I think that having the full picture within one platform would make involve SO much better. It is great, but obviously, everything can be better and make our funnels run seamlessly and smoothly. I wish you could MOVE the slides/pages from "before" the outcomes to "after" and transition to an outcome easily. I accidentally put the pages on the wrong side and had to completely rebuild all the pages. I also wish they had a more intuitive builder, like something you could maybe "map out" a little better with both horizontal and vertical layouts. The "jump to" and outcomes with logic get extremely confusing. More explanation on these would be great. Ultimately, support has been very helpful!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
